Shipping Policy

We ship to all countries in the European Union and to the United States. Orders placed before 14:00 CET on a business day are dispatched the same day.

Delivery times

Standard delivery takes 2 to 4 business days within the EU and 5 to 8 business days to the United States. Express delivery is available at checkout for an additional fee.

Free shipping

Orders over 75 euros qualify for free standard shipping. The threshold is calculated after discounts are applied.
